title: STFT Spectrogram Analysis - 左手指月
brief: A scientific audio spectrum analysis screen. Dark black background with a colorful spectrogram waterfall plot in the center. Vertical axis labeled frequency (Hz) from 50Hz to 8000Hz, horizontal axis is time. Bright energy bands climb from low frequencies to high frequencies, finally exploding into golden yellow and white in the high frequency region around 1000Hz. Left side has dB scale, bottom has oscilloscope-style waveform. Looks like a professional acoustic lab monitoring screen with grid lines and HUD tech elements. Title in monospace font says 'FIGURE 1: STFT Spectrogram Analysis - 左手指月 (E3-B5)'. The spectrogram shape subtly resembles a phoenix or a finger pointing at the moon (metaphor for the song title). Precision instrument aesthetic.
